meta.title: Know yourself, one assessment at a time.
meta.description: Terumiu builds Grader, an open assessment platform for personality, skills, and interests. We craft products and insights that help you discover new sides of yourself.

hero.title:
Know yourself,
one assessment at a time.
hero.lead: Personality, skills, interests. Terumiu designs open assessments anyone can try — moments that help you meet a new side of yourself.

service.title: Grader — an open assessment platform
service.lead: Personality, skills, interests. Pick an assessment, answer a few questions, and get data-driven results with fresh insight. Sign in to save and share your results.

features.title: A growing library
features.body: From personality tests to skill checks, we continuously add open assessments for every purpose.

features.title: Clear results
features.body: Get a visualized score and explanation right after you finish, so your tendencies are easy to grasp.

features.title: Multilingual
features.body: Available in Japanese, English and more — the same experience, shared across the world.

items.title: Honest data design
items.body: We take responsibility for how assessments are designed and shown — a trustworthy experience that never overstates.

items.title: Gentle products
items.body: Intuitive without expertise required. We value clear, open design that welcomes everyone.

items.title: Always sharing
items.body: We share new assessments and learnings on the Journal, offering ongoing sparks for self-understanding.

journal.title: Latest updates
journal.lead: New assessment announcements, behind-the-scenes notes, and insights to help you understand yourself.

about.title: A product studio, built with care.
about.lead: Terumiu is a studio that plans and runs web services and products. Today, through Grader, we deliver a way to know yourself.

cta.title: Why not try one right now?
cta.lead: No sign-up needed to start. Pick an assessment that catches your eye and go meet a new side of yourself.

meta.title: Service
meta.description: Grader — the open assessment platform run by Terumiu.

hero.title: Grader
hero.lead: An open assessment platform for personality, skills, and interests. Pick one, answer a few questions, and meet a new side of yourself.

sections.title: Pick an assessment
sections.body: Browse by category and difficulty across personality, skills, and interests. Sort by newest or most popular to find what fits.

sections.title: Answer, get results
sections.body: From a handful to a few dozen questions, answer at your own pace. A visualized score and explanation appear the moment you finish.

sections.title: Save and reflect
sections.body: Sign in to save your results, look back later, and compare over time. Sharing is supported too.

items.title: Look at yourself anew
items.body: For those who want an objective view of their personality and strengths.

items.title: A spark to grow
items.body: For those searching for a hint toward the next step.

items.title: Use it as a team
items.body: For teams and communities that want to deepen mutual understanding.

meta.title: About
meta.description: About Terumiu — the values behind a studio that builds web services and products.

hero.title:
Small discoveries,
thoughtfully made.
hero.lead: Terumiu is a studio that plans and runs web services and products. We craft every experience with care.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Terumiu aims to spark small discoveries in everyday life through technology and design. Today, through our service Grader, we create a place where each person can meet a new side of who they are.

story.title: Why we build
story.body: Not an elaborate machine, but a product with a good feel that you just want to try. Never alarmist, always careful. We aim to make the first step as light as possible.

operator.title: Operator

items.label: Business
items.value: Planning, development & operation of web services and products

operator.contactBody: Please reach out through our contact form.
